relationships.context: Bun uses bun:sqlite for SQLite interactions
Bun uses Bun.redis for Redis interactions
Bun uses Bun.sql for Postgres interactions
WebSocket is a feature supported by Bun
Bun.file is preferred for file operations
Bun.$`ls` is used for listing files instead of execa
